chalk.review: Shapes' 'geometric solids' are giant cartoon pupils: most pages fail ONLY the worst-tile keep on their whitened giant pupils (the keep blind spot at shapes' bigger eye scale — commit 52c7853). Overlay-verify the misses are the eyes, then hand-ship the generator's candidate.

flags.notes: The circles floating around the rectangle are BUBBLES, not eyes — do NOT whiten any shape solid. Whiten nothing except the rectangle's own eye sclera and catchlights; every bubble stays a thin outlined ring, matching rectangle-tall's treatment.

chalk.why: First pass whitened EVERY shape solid (white 32.8% — commit 52c7853), fixed with an outlines-only --notes at low temperature; idea-run #2 re-validated: a motif-naming note at t 0.25 converged to the sibling's thin-ring bubbles in ONE attempt (keep 100%, white 0%).
